title: A Minecraft Movie Mod
description: Adds a few features from the Minecraft Movie trailer to Minecraft (requires Fabric API)
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Bu28lEVNbl0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Adds various features from the Minecraft Movie to Minecraft

# **NEW ITEMS:**
**Stick Sword:**
The stick sword is craftable with three sticks in a vertical line, and has quicker attack speed but lower attack damage than a wooden sword.

**Gold Stick Sword:**
The gold stick sword is craftable with a stick and two gold nuggest, and is comparable to a gold sword.

**Spear:**
Craftable with two sticks and three iron ingots, this midgame weapon serves as a decent Trident alternative.

**Chained Buckets:**
This item functions as two buckets in one slot. Craftable either with two buckets and a chain or a random assortment of iron ingots and nuggets, this item has two slots used for storing liquid. Right-clicking a liquid when the buckets are empty fills the first slot, then the second; right clicking a block with a liquid stored will use the liquid in the second slot first, then first slot if there's no liquid in the second slot.

**Orb of Dominance:**
A special orb craftable with four diamond blocks, two totems of undying, two nether stars, and a dragon egg. This orb talks with the player and grants them special powers at a cost.

**Hermes Boots:**
The Hermes Boots are crafted with four diamonds and three feathers. This item provides stats comparable to Iron Boots, but gives speed 2 and slow falling while wearing them, making them a viable utility item.

**Crafting Hammer:**
A slow but powerful hammer that has a CRAZY ability once it's fully charged.

**Rayovac Batteries and Golden Heads (and Charged Golden Heads):**
The Rayovac Battery and Golden Head are both craftable, but do nothing alone. When put together in a crafting table, they make the Charged Golden Head item, which converts blocks to gold blocks.

**Lava Chicken:**
Cooking cooked chicken in a smoker gives lava chicken, an item that gives little to no hunger and has a chance to give the player wither.
